raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Epilepsy is the most common brain disorder worldwide, affecting 1 percent of the population.",
    "Epilepsy receives half of one percent of the annual National Institute of Health funding.",
    "Sudden Death in Epilepsy accounts for 34% of all sudden deaths in children.",
    "50 percent of epilepsy cases begin in childhood.",
    "Seizures can damage a child's developing brain.",
    "Early diagnosis and prompt treatment of pediatric epilepsy can have a large impact on the child's quality of life."
```
